arabic: عن ابن عمر رضي الله عنهما قال‏:‏ نهى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  عن القزع‏.‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Ibn 'Umar (May Allah be pleased with them) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) forbade shaving a part of the head..

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
